sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18174" key="a)fe/ggeia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφέγγ-εια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n18174.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">want of light,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:40:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
